title: Senior/ M&E Executive (Commercial Grade A Building)
description:
Responsibilities

  • Carry out regular site checks to ensure the building and facilities are well-maintained, safe, and fully operational.
  • Manage day-to-day building operations including security services, cleaning, landscaping, waste handling, irrigation systems, car park operations, and rectification of defects.
  • Regulate and oversee the proper use of shared facilities and common areas to ensure compliance with house rules.
  • Coordinate with term contractors to ensure all servicing and maintenance works are completed according to agreed schedules and service standards.
  • Conduct routine inspections of the premises, including car parks, to ensure cleanliness, signage visibility, and overall upkeep.
  • Support budget planning and monitoring for operating expenses and capital works related to building management.
  • Perform regular checks on fire protection systems and organise periodic fire drills to ensure safety readiness and regulatory compliance.
  • Engage and communicate effectively with tenants, members of the public, contractors, and authorities on building matters, improvement works, emergencies, and compliance requirements, including after office hours when necessary.

Requirements:

  • Diploma in Building Management, Building Services, or a related discipline.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage a wide range of stakeholders.
  • Service-oriented mindset with a proactive and positive approach to work.
  • Able to work independently while also collaborating effectively as part of a team.

Please submit your updated resume in Word format by using the Apply Now Button.
We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
Email resume to ken.ng@peopleprofilers.com
People Profilers Pte Ltd, 20 Cecil Street, #08-09, PLUS Building, Singapore 049705. Tel: 6950 9724
http://www.peopleprofilers.com

postedCompany.description:
Since our humble beginnings in 2002, People Profilers has steadily grown from strength to strength. Our expertise in providing Human Capital consultancy to our clients – universally sought after skills and expertise in just about any sector– has allowed People Profilers to leave an imprint across various industries and build a reputation for competency and expertise.

 

What differentiates People Profilers from every other recruiter is our unwavering commitment to building relationships with our clients- understanding exactly what our clients are after, and allowing us to match their precise needs. We deliver human capital solutions that allow organisations and their employees to succeed.

 

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
